Localization.Name: Bobcat Bomber Jacket Classic
Localization.Description:
Carrying Capacity: 1K µSCU

Inspired by the traditional jackets worn by Earth's early pilots, this coat provides a flattering fit thanks to its elasticated waist and cuffs, blending fashion with functionality.

The Classic edition is a sepia brown.
